focus: Batch-audit the remaining P2 fixture/doc drift tail, verify the live stale-reference surfaces, and pre-stage the narrowed STILL_OPEN restart backlog.

graphEvents.detail: Reducer/schema stability complaints moved to ADDRESSED: the deep-review reducer now supports both legacy and live iteration section layouts and preserves blendedScore before falling back to graphScore.

A large P2 fixture-drift slice moved to SUPERSEDED because current main now ships direct handler/schema coverage for deep-loop graph and later tool families instead of the archived or string-only surfaces the 015 report anchored to.

Five new live doc/runtime issues moved into STILL_OPEN with current file-line evidence: coverage-graph status fail-open, troubleshooting memory-folder guidance, AUTO_SAVE_MODE doc drift, sk-code-full-stack path drift, and the cli-copilot duplicate tail.

The restart backlog is now staged as 19 evidence-backed findings across DB/resume boundaries, coverage-graph semantics, advisor degraded-state surfacing, startup/save-quality hardening, and reference/doc parity cleanup.
